creator: freebsd@dreamchaser.org
text:
Some links on the bsdstats website, bsdstats.org, don't work properly:

The "Port Stats" link at the bottom doesn't work;
  it seems to bring up the main page
The "Release Stats" link at the bottom behaves strangely:
  If the last thing clicked was from the bottom menu,
  the release stats link brings up that page again.

I'm running firefox 80.o with noscript
 11.3-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 11.3-RELEASE-p6 #0: Tue Jan 28 09:55:39 UTC 2020     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
